name: simpledraw-desktop
description: SimpleDraw - 轻量级流程图绘制桌面应用
author: SimpleDraw Team

scripts.dev: concurrently -k "npm run dev:renderer" "npm run build:main && npm run build:preload && npm run copy:assets && electron dist/main/main.js"
scripts.copy:assets: cp -r src/renderer/index.html src/renderer/styles.css dist/renderer/ 2>/dev/null; cp -r assets/fonts dist/renderer/fonts 2>/dev/null; mkdir -p assets && node -e "try{require('fs').writeFileSync('assets/icon.png',Buffer.from('','base64'))}catch(e){}"
scripts.build: npm run build:main && npm run build:preload && npm run build:renderer && npm run copy:assets
scripts.build:portable: npm run build && npm run build:asar && node scripts/build-zip.mjs
